3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.opcua/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.
